name: Pecan Tea Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and powdered sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the egg and vanilla extract.
3. Combine the flour, salt, and nutmeg in a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture.
5. Mix well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
6. Shape the dough into small balls.
7. Place the cookie balls on a greased baking sheet.
8. Beat together the egg yolk and water to form an egg wash.
9. Brush each cookie ball with the egg wash.
10. Lightly press a pecan half onto the top of each cookie.
11. Bake in a preheated 350-degree Fahrenheit oven for 12 to 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
12. Remove from the oven and let cool on the baking sheet before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
